name: EIB Project Venus (Inaugural Digital Bond)
chain: Ethereum (private deployment via Goldman Sachs DAP)
summary: EUR 100M two-year digital bond — EIB's first ever digital bond — issued April 2021 via Goldman Sachs Digital Asset Platform. Lead managers: Goldman Sachs, Santander, Société Générale. Settled in EUR via Banque de France wCBDC experimentation. Historical importance: first major supranational issuance entirely on blockchain rails with regulatory clearance under Luxembourg's then-new blockchain law (Loi Blockchain II, 2019). Precursor to the EU's broader DLT Pilot Regime (DLTR) launched March 2023.

sources.title: EIB press release on Project Venus

underlying_asset: EIB unsecured senior debt obligation; two-year tenor; fixed coupon.
secondary_market: Limited — issued to small group of institutional investors; permissioned network.
redemption_mechanism: Coupon + principal paid in EUR via wCBDC experimentation with Banque de France.
upgrade_authority: EIB issuance terms; Goldman operates platform.

timeline.event: EIB issues first digital bond (EUR 100M) on Goldman DAP
EU DLT Pilot Regime takes effect (Project Venus a key precedent)
